title: Permafrost, Carbon, and Northern Wildfires
description: NAU researchers helped show how northern wildfires can trigger long-term climate impacts by accelerating permafrost thaw and carbon release.
imageAlt: Emergency helicopter flying above a forest fire and billowing smoke
impact: Radiant's remote sensing and climate analysis work helps reveal how fire reshapes high-latitude ecosystems and carbon storage over time. By connecting satellite data, fire records, and environmental modeling, NAU researchers are improving how we understand and respond to climate-driven landscape change.
